metadata.title: Create AI Videos and Images | ChatGPT Image 2 Generator
metadata.description: Create AI videos and images in one ChatGPT Image 2 Generator workspace. Switch between video and image modes without leaving the create page.

page.title: Create AI videos or images
page.description: Switch between AI video and AI image creation in one ChatGPT Image 2 Generator workspace.

generator.title: AI Image Generator
generator.description: Generate or edit images from text prompts and reference images.

form.prompt_placeholder: Describe the details of the image, such as color, shape, texture, etc.
form.reference_image_placeholder: Upload reference images, support multiple images
form.some_images_failed_to_upload: Some images failed to upload, please delete them and re-upload
form.prompt_too_long: Prompt is too long, please delete some content

generator_switcher.seedance_description: Best for multimodal references, stronger camera direction, and cinematic output.
generator_switcher.kling_description: Best for multi-shot storytelling, element consistency, and native audio.
